items.name: command-grid-brand
items.title: Command Grid Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for sharper mixed-media and operations suite shells. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "command-grid",
  "title": "Command Grid",
  "summary": "Sharper suite-shell direction for mixed-media and business operations: blue command accents, tighter radius, and registry-first install cards.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "suite shell stress-test candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-red-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-gold-bg.png"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#315C8E",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#9BB7E3",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#A64B72",
    "radius.control": "4px",
    "spacing.control": "7px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "280px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#315C8E",
    "focusRing": "#A64B72",
    "radius": "4",
    "spacing": "7",
    "density": "0.9",
    "motion": "80",
    "dockWidth": "280",
    "fontSize": "15"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "command-board shell with registry graph and media/status panes",
    "chrome": "tight cards, tabular metadata, strong install/provenance affordances",
    "markTreatment": "abstract glasses or bow-grid emblem for small package and app icons",
    "bestFor": [
      "mixed-media suite",
      "business operations suite",
      "registry item choice and install inspection"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "can feel too cold unless paired with the soft character cue",
      "requires careful contrast checks for blue accent on dark surfaces"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "blue accent is intended for command states and selected registry rows"
    ],
    "states": [
      "registry choices",
      "media grids",
      "error and denied states",
      "narrow workbench viewport"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.

items.name: editorial-studio-brand
items.title: Editorial Studio Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for a calmer docs and research-writing suite presentation. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "editorial-studio",
  "title": "Editorial Studio",
  "summary": "A restrained creator-workbench option with richer plum accent, quieter spacing, and wordmark-first presentation for docs and writing suites.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "editorial suite candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-cream-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-peach-bg.jpg"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#6F3D5F",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#D8A5C8",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#237C7A",
    "radius.control": "8px",
    "spacing.control": "10px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "340px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#6F3D5F",
    "focusRing": "#237C7A",
    "radius": "8",
    "spacing": "10",
    "density": "1.05",
    "motion": "140",
    "dockWidth": "340",
    "fontSize": "16"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "quiet document and source review shell",
    "chrome": "measured panels, larger reading rows, strong citation/status scanning",
    "markTreatment": "wordmark or serif title lockup with a simplified bow/glasses companion mark",
    "bestFor": [
      "research-writing suite",
      "docs and source panels",
      "brand book and documentation previews"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "must avoid drifting into a cream-only editorial page",
      "needs sharper app-chrome treatment for dense operations screens"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "plum accent is intended for labelled controls, active tabs, and large UI emphasis"
    ],
    "states": [
      "source citations",
      "redacted panels",
      "long reading content",
      "light and dark modes"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.

items.name: jami-theme
items.title: Jami Factory Theme
items.description: Warm Jami factory theme: generated CSS variables, Tailwind @theme variables, TypeScript token names, and shadcn cssVars derived from the DTCG token source.

files.content:
// Generated by scripts/contracts/generate-contract-artifacts.mjs. Do not edit by hand.
export const tokenSchemaVersion = "2026-06-09.token-foundation" as const;

export const tokenNames = [
  "color.brand.accent",
  "color.brand.teal",
  "color.neutral.warm0",
  "color.neutral.warm950",
  "semantic.light.background",
  "semantic.light.foreground",
  "semantic.light.accent",
  "semantic.dark.background",
  "semantic.dark.foreground",
  "semantic.dark.accent",
  "typography.body",
  "spacing.control",
  "radius.control",
  "shadow.overlay",
  "motion.fast",
  "density.comfortable",
  "shell.dockWidth",
  "componentState.focusRing",
  "componentState.deprecatedAccentAlias",
] as const;

export type JamiTokenName = (typeof tokenNames)[number];

export const tokenCssVariables: Record<JamiTokenName, string> = {
  "color.brand.accent": "var(--jami-color-brand-accent)",
  "color.brand.teal": "var(--jami-color-brand-teal)",
  "color.neutral.warm0": "var(--jami-color-neutral-warm0)",
  "color.neutral.warm950": "var(--jami-color-neutral-warm950)",
  "semantic.light.background": "var(--jami-semantic-light-background)",
  "semantic.light.foreground": "var(--jami-semantic-light-foreground)",
  "semantic.light.accent": "var(--jami-semantic-light-accent)",
  "semantic.dark.background": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-background)",
  "semantic.dark.foreground": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-foreground)",
  "semantic.dark.accent": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-accent)",
  "typography.body": "var(--jami-typography-body)",
  "spacing.control": "var(--jami-spacing-control)",
  "radius.control": "var(--jami-radius-control)",
  "shadow.overlay": "var(--jami-shadow-overlay)",
  "motion.fast": "var(--jami-motion-fast)",
  "density.comfortable": "var(--jami-density-comfortable)",
  "shell.dockWidth": "var(--jami-shell-dockWidth)",
  "componentState.focusRing": "var(--jami-componentState-focusRing)",
  "componentState.deprecatedAccentAlias": "var(--jami-componentState-deprecatedAccentAlias)",
};

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Initial theme item. Files are the generated token outputs; regenerate with pnpm contracts:generate when the token source changes.

items.name: studio-console-brand
items.title: Studio Console Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for a dense operational default kit presentation. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "studio-console",
  "title": "Studio Console",
  "summary": "Dense workbench shell with character cues reduced to compact chrome, teal command affordances, and controlled warm-magenta emphasis.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "operational default candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-white-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-pink-bg.jpg"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#2F6F73",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#76C6BE",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#C14D84",
    "radius.control": "6px",
    "spacing.control": "8px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "300px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#2F6F73",
    "focusRing": "#C14D84",
    "radius": "6",
    "spacing": "8",
    "density": "0.95",
    "motion": "100",
    "dockWidth": "300",
    "fontSize": "15"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "compact split registry and suite shell",
    "chrome": "flat panels, small badges, strong table/list density",
    "markTreatment": "tiny glasses/bow cue or monogram slot, not the detailed character image",
    "bestFor": [
      "default kit install preview",
      "CLI and registry package cards",
      "operator-heavy workbench sessions"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "can become too utilitarian if the character cue is removed entirely",
      "needs a production small mark before package badges use it"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "accent is selected for AA non-text and large-control use against the warm light background"
    ],
    "states": [
      "focus-visible",
      "long content",
      "dense navigation",
      "dark mode"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.
